{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blackwatch nails
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Watchmen]] give [[Calder]] a foot-long iron spike every day for a week; seven nails in total are used to bind and paralyze a [[Lesser Elder]].}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
